summary: OBE — already-fixed-by-source. ISS-1258 (WIN-062.c5 H0 carve-out undersell, severity=minor) tracks the same hole as ISS-1232 (c4 H4) which decider self-apply commit d4dc3a54 closed on 2026-04-20T22:38 by appending the recommended condition-1 sentence ("The derivation condition (Part 3.1b, condition 1) also fails independently: the dome re-expresses Tesla's measured value using disc diameter rather than globe circumference, producing numerical agreement by construction rather than independent derivation from dome geometry.") to data/wins.json id='062' detail_verdict_text. Sentence verified verbatim in current FUSE wins.json (2026-05-16). ISS-1258 was created 12 minutes before d4dc3a54 landed (22:25 vs 22:37) and never got re-routed when the parallel fix shipped — stale-issue artifact of overlapping c4/c5 cycles. No patch needed; no verdict change. Cite d4dc3a54 in closure note.
